summary: Bug fix verification for feed 'new posts' count, Now Spinning caption layout, and global BackToTop button. All fixes verified working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three bug fixes verified: (1) New posts queue deduplicates against displayed posts via postsRef, (2) Now Spinning caption layout moved outside inner flex row for full width, (3) Global BackToTop in App.js with correct mobile/desktop positioning.

features_verified.feed_loads_correctly: PASS - Feed API returns 20 posts with correct structure
features_verified.new_posts_deduplication: PASS - Code review confirms postsRef.current used in both WebSocket handler (line 233) and polling fallback (line 261)
features_verified.caption_layout_fix: PASS - Caption is outside inner flex row (line 404 is after line 403 closing div)
features_verified.global_backtotop_hive: PASS - BackToTop visible on /hive after scroll, desktop bottom=24px
features_verified.global_backtotop_mobile: PASS - Mobile BackToTop bottom=80px (correct per spec)
features_verified.global_backtotop_profile: PASS - BackToTop rendered globally in App.js (line 409)
features_verified.no_duplicate_backtotop: PASS - CollectionPage and ProfilePage have no BackToTop imports

bug_fix_details.new_posts_count_fix: Added postsRef (useRef) to track current displayed posts. WebSocket handler (line 232-233) and polling fallback (line 260-262) now deduplicate against BOTH newPostsQueue AND postsRef.current, preventing duplicate 'X new posts' counts.
bug_fix_details.caption_layout_fix: NowSpinningCard (line 404): post.caption rendered outside the inner flex row (album art + metadata). Caption now gets full left column width, not squeezed between album art (96px) and user photo (80px).
bug_fix_details.backtotop_global_fix: BackToTop component added to App.js (line 409) alongside VariantModal and Toaster. Removed from CollectionPage and ProfilePage. CSS uses --btt-bottom variable: 80px on mobile (<768px), 24px on desktop (>=768px).

code_review_notes.HivePage_postsRef: Lines 72-73: postsRef keeps sync with posts state via useEffect. Lines 232-233: WS checks postsRef.current. Lines 260-262: Polling checks postsRef.current.
code_review_notes.PostCards_caption: Line 404: Caption p tag with mt-2 is AFTER the inner flex div (album art row), inside the left column div. This gives caption full width of left column.
code_review_notes.BackToTop_component: Uses CSS custom property --btt-bottom with @media queries. Mobile: 80px (above bottom nav). Desktop: 24px. z-index: 100003.
code_review_notes.App_BackToTop: Line 409: <BackToTop /> rendered inside VariantModalProvider, appears on all pages.
